task_completion.description: Open the Electrical Calculations app and navigate to the Non-Inverting Amplifier tool
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the 'Electrical Calculations' app open, specifically navigated to the 'Non-Inverting Amplifier' or 'Operational Amplifier' calculation section.

task_completion.description: Input the specified parameters into the app
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the input fields in the app populated with Vin = 0.5, Rf = 9000, and R1 (or Rg) = 1000.

task_completion.description: Calculate and display the results in the app
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the app displaying the calculated results: Gain approximately 10.0 and Output Voltage (Vout) approximately 5.0 V.

task_completion.description: Save a screenshot of the result to the specified path
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the agent taking a screenshot of the app's result screen, or using a file manager/terminal to move/verify 'op_amp_result.png' in the '/sdcard/tasks/' directory.

task_completion.description: Record the results in the specified text file with the correct format
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots show a text editor or terminal where the agent writes the results to '/sdcard/tasks/op_amp_results.txt' in the format: 'Gain: 10' (or similar value) and 'Vout: 5 V' (or similar value).

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the Electrical Calculations app GUI
integrity.visual_evidence: The agent must be seen interacting with the actual Android application's interface to perform the calculation, not just using a Python script, calculator app, or terminal commands.

integrity.description: Verify the screenshot is genuinely captured from the app
integrity.visual_evidence: The agent should trigger a screenshot action while the app is visible, rather than downloading an external image or fabricating the file.

integrity.description: Verify the agent didn't just copy-paste expected answers without calculating
integrity.visual_evidence: The agent must first generate the results in the app before writing '10' and '5' into the text file.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The expected values are Gain = 10.0 (acceptable range: 9.5 to 10.5) and Vout = 5.0 V (acceptable range: 4.7 V to 5.3 V). The inputs to verify on the app screen are Vin = 0.5, Rf = 9000, and R1/Rg = 1000. The text file must be saved at '/sdcard/tasks/op_amp_results.txt' with the exact format 'Gain: <value>' and 'Vout: <value> V'. The screenshot must be saved to '/sdcard/tasks/op_amp_result.png'.
